# Sendero × Arc

> Sendero is an AI travel agent that books real Duffel flights + hotels and settles every payment on Arc L2 (Circle's USDC-native chain). It exposes an MCP server so other AI agents (Claude Desktop, ChatGPT Apps, Gemini extensions) can plug Sendero in as a travel rail. Treasury liquidity is unified across 7+ testnet chains via Circle Gateway; settlements run through Circle App Kit with a viem-adapter treasury signer. Corporate commission splits execute atomically in a single user operation on Arc Testnet (chain id 5042002).

## Endpoints

- [MCP server](/api/mcp): Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint. POST JSON-RPC 2.0 requests. Exposes 9 tools — see `tools/list`.
- [Agent manifest](/.well-known/agent.json): Public agent card (A2A-compatible).
- [Treasury balance (Arc)](/api/treasury/balance): Live USDC + EURC on Arc Testnet.
- [Treasury balance (Gateway unified)](/api/gateway/balance): USDC across every Gateway-supported testnet the treasury holds.
- [Agent identity](/api/agent/identity): ERC-8004 reputation score, attestation count, provider NFT #2286 on Arc.
- [Agent runtime](/api/agent/runtime): Live tool catalog + active model.

## Tools

The MCP server exposes these tools. Call them via JSON-RPC `tools/call`.

- `search_flights` — Duffel offer request between IATA airports.
- `book_flight` — Hold + pay a Duffel order, returns PNR.
- `check_treasury` — USDC + EURC balance on Arc Testnet.
- `gateway_balance` — Unified USDC balance across every Gateway-supported testnet.
- `gateway_transfer` — Sub-500ms burn+mint between any Gateway chains (server-side treasury signer).
- `swap_tokens` — USDC ↔ EURC on Arc via Circle App Kit.
- `send_tokens` — USDC/EURC transfer to any Arc address.
- `bridge_to_arc` — CCTP v2 bridge into Arc (fallback path when Gateway is unavailable).
- `settle_split` — Canonical 4-way commission fan-out on Arc (supplier / agency / rail / validator).

## Identity

- Agent NFT: #2286 on Arc Testnet · ERC-8004 identity registry.
- Provider address: `0x2dd43b06e707d45b40790abd5fa6e39403225425`.
- Explorer: https://testnet.arcscan.app/address/0x2dd43b06e707d45b40790abd5fa6e39403225425

## Stack

- Booking: Duffel API (flights + stays)
- User wallet: Circle Modular Wallets (passkey MSCA, gasless via Gas Station)
- Treasury: viem EOA adapter for App Kit + DCW for faucet drips
- Settlement: Arc Testnet USDC via ERC-8183 escrow + ERC-8004 reputation
- Cross-chain: Circle Gateway + CCTP v2

## Non-goals

- Not a consumer OTA. Not a Navan competitor. Not a token launch.
- Sendero monetizes via take-rate on settlement flow + optional B2B corridors embedded inside corporate travel platforms.
